name: Monster Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the egg whites, brown sugar, granulated sugar, peanut butter, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Gradually add the vegetable oil to the mixture and stir until smooth.
3. Stir in the baking oatmeal, one tablespoon at a time, until just incorporated.
4. Fold in the chocolate chips using a spatula or wooden spoon.
5. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or spray with cooking spray.
6. Using an ice cream scoop or level 40 dipper, drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto the prepared sheet, about 1½ inches apart.
7. Gently press down on each cookie with the back of a fork dipped in cold water to flatten slightly.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 12 minutes, or until lightly browned and set around the edges.
9. Remove from oven and transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool completely at room temperature.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 137, Fat: 7g, Carbohydrates: 16g, Sodium: 44mg, Protein: 4g
